corrections.note: Printed dative participle is μεγαλοποιοῦντι, not μεγαλοποιοῦντε.

corrections.current: ἐμπιστεῦσαι μεθʼ ἡμῶν τὸ ἔλεος αὐτοῦ,
corrections.correct: ἐμπιστεῦσαι μεθʼ ἡμῖν τὸ ἔλεος αὐτοῦ,
corrections.note: Image clearly reads ἡμῖν, not ἡμῶν.
The abbreviated reading is for καρ- with overline, not κς.

notes: Left-margin parenthetical numbers are line indicators and were not incorrectly captured in the body. Running head matches. Apparatus mostly matches; one nomen sacrum/abbreviation in l. 23 appears misdecoded.
